name: Compostable Courier Bags

description: Sturdy D-cut carry bags for retail stores. A perfect plastic-free alternative.

description: Biodegradable mulch film for agriculture. No need to remove — it composts in soil.

description: Convenient roll format for high-volume retail use.

description: Heavy-duty compostable garbage bags for homes and businesses.

description: Roll-format garbage bags for easy dispensing.

description: Roll-format grocery bags for supermarkets and stores.

description: Industrial-grade compostable stretch wrap for pallets and logistics.

description: Keep baked goods fresh in compostable bread pouches.

description: Premium loop-handle bags for boutiques and upscale retail.
